channel.title: Auto-AI-Cluster
channel.description: Production-grade autonomous AI cluster for 2C4G VPS. Architecture white paper + open source code.

item.title: v1.0.0 Release — Auto-AI-Cluster
item.description: First public release with Docker Compose Community Edition, K8s Enterprise, Authorization System, Distributor Tools, and 11-chapter Architecture White Paper.

item.title: Architecture White Paper Published
item.description: 11-chapter engineering white paper on building autonomous AI clusters under 2C4G constraints. Free download.
